concept.title: 12 The function of the input unit

abstract.p: The input unit is the media guide between the media loading drawer and the buffer unit.

section.title: Position in the process
section.p: The input unit is placed right above the media loading drawer.
The input unit guides the media from the media loading drawer towards the buffer unit.
There is no drive in the input unit, only guidance.

section.title: Static eliminator
section.p: Media that is unwound from the media roll tends to be very static. Static charges on the media are not wanted. It makes the media stick to everything.
Therefore there is an antistatic brush at the entrance of the input unit. This brush has a good earth connection and removes the static charge from the media.

section.title: Access door
section.p: The input unit has a door that can be opened. The door is used to remove jammed media or cut it manually.
